ok

mismatch

Mismatch

Post Weight Sample 2

Line 1 - Moisture Test

Submission: TTH26236101

Created At: 12-03-2026 05:43 PM

Time Slot: 5 PM - 7 PM

Open image Open original Clappia link
Expected
17.470
System Output
0.470
System Status
ok
Confidence
0.96
Initial Match Status
mismatch
Final Status
mismatch
Review Status
Reviewed Value
Review Note
Reason
Structured verifier: The proposed candidate '17.470' is incorrect. The display clearly shows '0.470', where the leading '1' and '7' are not active digits but dim placeholder outlines. The active digits are '470' with a decimal point before the '4', and a dim '8' outline (representing '0') before the decimal. Consensus override: structured verifier replaced the weaker primary read.
Mismatch

Review Note
Reason
Value 0.685 clearly visible on the LCD display in the primary localized crop. Structured verifier confirmed the same reading. Final read remained partially ambiguous after verification; returning the best-supported value.
Mismatch
